contextual_meaning: This is the moment when the mind stops running from pain and finally experiences the unshakable joy of simply being oneself.
psychological_state: Post-peak flow: the nervous system has down-shifted from survival to coherence; intrusive self-talk falls silent; the default-mode network quiets; one abides as awareness itself, no longer fused with any story of gain or loss.
trigger_scenario: After months of panic attacks you sit in therapy, breathe through the last tremor, and realize the anxiety isn’t ‘you’—it’s just weather passing through the sky of mind. A deep okayness remains that no headline can shake.
anchor_text: Feel the pain fully; it dissolves and reveals the joy of simply being.
